# 📄 IEEE 7012 Integration Plan v2
**document** · shared · knowledge

Roadmap for IEEE 7012-2025 adoption in the Swordsman/Mage agent pair. MRPAZ headers, bilateral chronicles (§5.2.4), P7012 agreement protocol, Σ/Δ/Γ scoring integration. Community deployment venues: AIW #3, IIW #43. Source: myterms/G_ieee7012_integration_plan.md.
